Bash(uv run python -c "
from bid_writer.main import BidWriter
app = BidWriter()
print(f''Output directory: {app.config.output_directory}'')
print(f''Has output directory: {app.ui.output_directory is not None}'')
print(f''Generated titles count: {len(app.ui._generated_titles)}'')
print(''Generated titles:'')
for title in sorted(app.ui._generated_titles):
    print(f''  - {title}'')
")
